[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up, low-resolution image shows a dog’s face centered in the frame with two yellow arrow graphics overlaid on the lower portion of the image.

The main subject is a dog with light-colored fur, darker markings around the eyes, and drooping ears, looking toward the camera. The dog’s head takes up most of the image, with its eyes visible and its mouth area slightly blurred.

The setting is unclear because the background is a plain, light surface with no distinct features. The lighting appears soft and even, and the camera is close to the subject, creating a shallow, out-of-focus look.

Visible text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image features a close-up view of a dog’s face. Two bright yellow arrows are overlaid pointing left and right toward the lower center area of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
